title: Knysna ward councillor has a ‘monkey on her back’
description: KNYSNA NEWS - DA Ward 9 councillor Sharon...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - DA Ward 9 councillor Sharon Sabbagh is facing a barrage of criticism over remarks she made during a special finance and governance committee meeting on Tuesday (March 26) saying it was a “yappa yappa monkey circus”.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - DA Ward 9 councillor Sharon Sabbagh is facing a barrage of criticism over remarks she made during a special finance and governance committee meeting on Tuesday (March 26) saying it was a “yappa yappa monkey circus”."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Now the ANC, EFF and Patriotic Alliance have called for Sabbagh to be sanctioned for breaching the councillors’ code of conduct - and she may even be slapped with charges of crimen injuria."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For the full story read the Knysna-Plett Herald this week which is being covered by Chris van Gass.","html":"For the full story read the Knysna-Plett Herald this week which is being covered by Chris van Gass."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna ward councillor has a ‘monkey on her back’
